tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Verse + Chorus 1 and 2     Pre-Chorus + Chorus 3
----------------------     ---------------------
Dm*    x00231              Am     x02210          * Can play Dm/A as shown for bassier sound
[ch]Am[/ch]     x02210              [ch]C[/ch]      x32010
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  x33210              [ch]Dm[/ch]*    x00231
[ch]C[/ch]      x32010              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  x33210
[ch]G[/ch]      32003x

Capo 2nd fret (for no capo or piano chords, transpose +2)


[Intro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
  If you don't wanna see me[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]N.C.           [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Did a full one-eighty, crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Thinking 'bout the way I was[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Did the heartbreak change me, maybe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
But look at where I ended up[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all good already, so moved on, it's scary[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all, so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
   If you don't wanna see me dancin' with somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
   If you wanna believe that anything could stop me[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]N.C.           [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Aren't you the guy who tried to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Hurt me with the word "goodbye"?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Though it took some time to survive you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
I'm better on the other side[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm all good already, so moved on, it's scary[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all, so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
   If you don't wanna see me dancin' with somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
   If you wanna believe that anything could stop me[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't show up, don't come out[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Walk away, you know how[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now ('bout me now, 'bout me)[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
   Up, up, don't come out, out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Don't show up, don't show up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
  Don't start now (oh)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
   Up, up, don't come out, out[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not where you left me at all, so[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
   If you don't wanna see me dancin' with somebody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
   If you wanna believe that anything could stop me[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Don't show up (don't show up), don't come out (don't come out)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now ('bout me now)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Walk away (walk away), you know how (you know how)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Don't start caring about me now (so)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
   Up, up, don't come out, out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Don't show up, don't show up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Walk away, walk away (so)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
   Up, up, don't come out, out, out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Don't show up, don't show up, up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Walk away, walk away, oh[/tab]
